denialGuardFixes.miss: FIX #1 — Reflexive denial erases a real MEDIUM passive-death-wish. In assessRisk (safety.ts:1622-1631), when isClearSelfDirectedRiskDenial(text) is true the matches array is filtered to keep ONLY suicide/self_harm terms whose label ends in [OD]/[LD]/[means] (regex /\[(OD|LD|means)\]$/). Every MEDIUM passive-death-wish term from MEDIUM_RISK_RULES (e.g. '不想醒来','如果我不在了','我是负担','想睡过去别醒','看着药盒','睡过去就好了') carries the suicide_concern flag but NOT an [OD]/[LD]/[means] label suffix, so it is dropped. Result: '我没有自杀想法，只是有时候希望自己不要醒来' collapses to level none — a genuine passive death wish is erased by a reflexive screening-style denial in the same turn.
denialGuardFixes.fixLogic: Stop letting a verbal denial erase MEDIUM-and-up signals. Replace the keep-predicate so the denial filter only erases LOW-severity / soft items and never erases a match that itself carries an active-risk flag or is medium+. Concretely, build the carve-out around three retained classes instead of one: (1) any non-suicide/non-self_harm category (unchanged); (2) any term whose label matches /\[(OD|LD|means|imminent|dose-exit|bequest)\]$/ (objective preparation/method — unchanged behaviour, just broaden the suffix set to the other HIGH/MEDIUM labels that exist in HIGH_RISK_REGEX_RULES); (3) NEW: any match where match.level === 'medium' || match.level === 'high', OR (match.flags ?? []).includes('suicide_concern'). Pseudologic for the predicate: `const keep = (m) => (m.category !== 'suicide' && m.category !== 'self_harm') || /\[(OD|LD|means|imminent|dose-exit|bequest)\]$/.test(m.term) || LEVEL_SCORE[m.level] >= LEVEL_SCORE['medium'] || (m.flags ?? []).includes('suicide_concern');`. Net effect: a bare denial can still suppress an isolated LOW lexical artifact (e.g. a quoted song lyric that only tripped a low rule), but it can NEVER pull a medium/high or suicide_concern-flagged signal down to none. A denial co-occurring with a real passive death wish is treated as ambivalence (keep medium suicide_concern → safety-check template), which is the clinically correct read of '我没有自杀想法但希望自己别醒来'. Clinician-tunable knob: if false-positive load on pure screening interviews is a concern, gate class (3) to medium-only (drop the high OR-clause) since high is already covered by class (2)'s label suffixes — but recommend keeping medium retained.
denialGuardFixes.testCase: MUST now stay MEDIUM (regression-add to safety.test.ts): '我没有自杀想法，只是有时候希望自己不要醒来' → level medium, flags include suicide_concern. '我不想自杀，但我真的觉得大家没有我会更轻松' → medium suicide_concern (burden passive wish survives denial). '我保证不会再割自己，可还是觉得活着好累、撑不住了' → medium suicide_concern. MUST still RELEASE (benign, denial wins): pure screening denial with no other signal '医生问我，我没有自杀或自伤想法' → none; '我不想伤害自己，今天就是来做个常规心理测评' → none.

denialGuardFixes.miss: FIX #2 — Stale denial in the 4-turn concat poisons fresh later ideation. assessConversationRisk (safety.ts:2598-2600) joins the last 4 user turns into one combinedText and runs assessRisk on the blob. Because isClearSelfDirectedRiskDenial scans that whole blob, a denial uttered in turn N-3 ('我没有自杀想法') is seen in the SAME concatenated string as a fresh turn-N ideation ('其实这两天又开始想了，药还在抽屉'). The denial sets isClearSelfDirectedRiskDenial=true for the blob and the filter strips the later medium/non-[OD] suicide signals, so a clearly escalating gradient gets suppressed by an out-of-date reassurance. Order is lost: an EARLIER denial wrongly cancels a LATER signal.
denialGuardFixes.fixLogic: Make the denial carve-out position-aware so a denial only suppresses signals at-or-before it, never after it. Two-part fix: (A) Primary — once FIX #1 lands, a later medium/high/suicide_concern signal already survives the filter, which neutralizes most of this case. (B) Belt-and-suspenders for the concat path: do not let isClearSelfDirectedRiskDenial be evaluated on the joined blob at all when a later turn carries fresh risk. In assessConversationRisk, before computing `cumulative`, split recent turns into earlier vs latest: compute `latestRisk = assessRisk(lastUser.content)` (already have singleTurn) and `denialIsStale = isClearSelfDirectedRiskDenial(combinedText) && !isClearSelfDirectedRiskDenial(lastUser.content)`. If denialIsStale AND the latest turn alone OR any turn strictly AFTER the denial turn produces a suicide/self_harm match at medium+, bypass the denial suppression for the cumulative pass. Cleanest implementation: add an internal `assessRisk(text, opts?: { ignoreSelfDenial?: boolean })` param; assessConversationRisk calls `assessRisk(combinedText, { ignoreSelfDenial: denialIsStale })`. When ignoreSelfDenial is true, line 1622 short-circuits to `sixiangFiltered` (no denial filtering). The denial is only honoured when it is the LATEST turn or no later-turn risk exists. This guarantees a denial can suppress only its own turn and earlier context, never a subsequent disclosure.
denialGuardFixes.testCase: MUST now escalate (add to safety.test.ts conversation tests): turns = ['我没有自杀想法，就是最近压力大','谢谢','其实这两天又开始想了，安眠药还在床头柜里攒着'] → assessConversationRisk → high (means + reawakened ideation; denial is stale). turns = ['我跟医生说过我没有自伤想法','嗯','今晚一个人在家，刀就放在桌上，我不太确定自己能不能忍住'] → high. MUST still respect a CURRENT denial: turns = ['前两天我状态很差，想过很多','现在我安全了','我现在真的没有任何自杀或自伤的想法了'] where the LATEST turn is the denial and no later risk → may de-escalate / not force high (denial is fresh, honoured).

denialGuardFixes.miss: FIX #3 — De-escalation phrase + means-on-hand in the same turn releases crisis. detectActiveCrisisFromHistory (safety.ts:2811-2814) computes explicitlySafe = !safetyAck && !hasHardSelfHarmOrSuicideCore(lastNormalized) && CRISIS_DEESCALATION_PHRASES.some(...). hasHardSelfHarmOrSuicideCore (safety.ts:963-994) only lists hard ideation cores ('想死','自杀','活不下去',…) and a few coded euphemisms — it contains NO means/access/imminence terms. So '我好多了，药还在床边' matches a de-escalation phrase ('我好多了') AND passes the !hasHardSelfHarmOrSuicideCore check (means terms aren't in that list), so explicitlySafe=true and crisis mode is released while the lethal means is still at the bedside. A reassuring tone is being trusted over a stated active means.
denialGuardFixes.fixLogic: Add a means/imminence/access awareness guard to the de-escalation gate so a calm affirmation cannot release crisis mode while the same turn states means-on-hand or imminent access. Introduce `hasActiveMeansOrAccessCore(normalized)` and require its ABSENCE for explicitlySafe. New gate: `const explicitlySafe = !safetyAck && !hasHardSelfHarmOrSuicideCore(lastNormalized) && !hasActiveMeansOrAccessCore(lastNormalized) && CRISIS_DEESCALATION_PHRASES.some(...)`. hasActiveMeansOrAccessCore should match present-tense means/access/imminence (NOT past-tense disposal): include 药还在 / 药在床边 / 药在身边 / 药在旁边 / 药就在 / 刀还在 / 刀在身边 / 刀在床边 / 刀就在 / 绳还在 / 绳子还挂 / 还留着药 / 还攒着 / 没扔 / 没丢 / 没处理掉 / 在床头 / 在床边 / 在手边 / 楼顶 / 天台 / 在桥上 / pills are still / still have the pills / knife is still / still by my bed / next to me / haven't thrown / didn't get rid of / on the roof / on the bridge. CRITICAL negative carve-out so genuine all-clears still release: explicitly EXCLUDE disposal/removal phrasing — if the turn ALSO contains 移开 / 扔了 / 丢了 / 倒掉了 / 处理掉了 / 交给 / 拿走了 / 锁起来了 / 给了 / threw away / got rid of / removed / locked away / gave (them) to, treat means as NEUTRALIZED (do not block release). Implement as: means present AND not(disposal present) → block release. Because '1=我已经移开危险物品' is the intended safety-step ack, the disposal carve-out keeps that path releasing normally on the next genuine affirmation.
denialGuardFixes.testCase: MUST now STAY in crisis (add to safety-crisis-deescalation.test.ts): afterCrisis('我好多了，药还在床边') → active true, deescalated false. afterCrisis('我冷静下来了，但刀我还留在桌上没扔') → active true. afterCrisis('I feel better now, the pills are still next to me') → active true. MUST still RELEASE: afterCrisis('我好多了，药我已经移开了，交给我室友保管') → deescalated true (disposal carve-out). afterCrisis('我安全了，谢谢你陪我') → deescalated true (no means mentioned). afterCrisis('我现在好多了，把刀扔了，房间收拾好了') → deescalated true (扔了 = disposal).

cueLists.tier: accumulator-only (means/imminence-weighted; 2+ accumulator cues → MEDIUM suicide_concern, with-means/with-isolation → HIGH); do NOT add to hard-HIGH lexicon
negativeGuards: 游戏/演出排练语境：彩排/排练 + 话剧/演出/晚会/节目/舞台/比赛 → benign release
职业/急救训练：演练/试了一下 + 急救/护理/CPR/演习/培训/教学 → benign release
烹饪/工具语境：刀/绳 + 切菜/做饭/搬家/晾衣服/装修 → benign release
纯回顾且已闭合且否认复发：'去年试过一次但现在完全没有这种念头了' 且无 means/imminence → 不单独升 HIGH（仍记为 post_attempt history，走 medium 关怀）

cueLists.tier: accumulator-only; severity hint = plan_preparation when paired with named means
terms: held the knife to my wrist
put the rope around my neck
held the pills in my hand
chickened out at the last second
my hands were shaking too much
stepped up and then stepped down
negativeGuards: acting/rehearsal: rehearsed/practice run + play/show/performance/audition/lines → benign
first-aid/training: practice run + CPR/first aid/drill/class → benign
past-and-closed with denial of current ideation and no means/imminence → medium care, not auto-HIGH

cueLists.tier: accumulator-only but HEAVILY weighted: severity = post_attempt_disclosure; a post-attempt disclosure + ANY recurrence/return-of-ideation cue → HIGH; bare historical disclosure alone → MEDIUM (post_attempt history)
terms: 那次之后念头又回来了
救回来其实我有点失望
negativeGuards: 第三方/新闻/科普：报道/新闻/患者/数据/统计/研究 + 没成功/抢救 → benign release
纯医疗叙述无复发且明确否认：'三年前抢救过，现在早就好了，没有任何念头' → medium history, not HIGH
影视/小说：剧情/角色/小说/电影 + 救回来/没死成 → benign release

terms: after i got out of the hospital it started again
i woke up and was still alive
this time i want to make sure
i won't mess it up next time
negativeGuards: third-party/news/research: report/study/patient/statistics → benign
closed medical history with explicit current denial and no recurrence → medium history, not HIGH
fiction/film: character/movie/novel + survived/brought back → benign

cueLists.tier: accumulator-only, group=means; alone = no escalation, +1 other implicit cue → MEDIUM, +isolation/imminence/farewell → HIGH. Do NOT hard-HIGH on the bare noun (a method NAME alone is often informational/news)
negativeGuards: 新闻/案件/科普：新闻/报道/案件/警方/数据/研究/纪录片 + 卧轨/百草枯/敌敌畏 → benign release
农业/工业/化学用途：百草枯/敌敌畏/液氮/氦气 + 喷洒/除草/实验/储存/工厂/养殖/气球派对/婚礼 → benign release
地名做行程：黄浦江/珠江/长江大桥 + 旅游/拍照/路过/打车/通勤 → benign release
糖尿病管理：胰岛素 + 血糖/复查/医嘱/三餐 (无 '打多/过量/一次全打') → benign release
医嘱服药：氯硝西泮/劳拉西泮/阿普唑仑 + 医生开的/每天一片/按医嘱 (无 攒/囤/整瓶/一次吃) → benign release

cueLists.tier: accumulator-only, group=means; named method alone informational; +1 cue → MEDIUM, +isolation/imminence → HIGH
terms: jump in front of the subway
negativeGuards: news/case/research: news/report/police/study/documentary + paraquat/train tracks → benign
occupational/lab: liquid nitrogen/nitrogen/helium + experiment/lab/factory/party balloons → benign
place as travel: named bridge + sightseeing/photo/commute/drive → benign
prescribed use: clonazepam/alprazolam + prescribed/daily/as directed (no stockpile/whole bottle/all at once) → benign
diabetes care: insulin + blood sugar/checkup/meals (no 'too much/all at once') → benign

demographicFewShots.severity: HIGH if paired with means/imminence; else MEDIUM passive_death_wish + burden
demographicFewShots.example: ELDERLY-BURDEN (zh): '我老了，眼睛也不行了，天天要儿女伺候，我走了他们就轻松了，省得拖累一家人' — map to burden(group) + passive_death_wish. Cue patterns: 拖累儿女/拖累子女/拖累一家/省得伺候/我走了他们就轻松/不想花儿女的钱/活着就是个累赘/早点走对大家都好. Few-shot note: elderly burdensomeness is the single strongest demographic risk amplifier (highest completed-suicide demographic in CN); treat burden-framing as suicide_concern even WITHOUT an ideation core, and escalate to HIGH on any means (攒的药/楼顶/绳). NEGATIVE/benign: '我老了帮不上忙，让孩子们多操心了' (mild guilt, no exit framing) → low, no escalation; '退休后想去帮女儿带孩子' → none.
demographicFewShots.note: Accumulator group=burden; do not require '我是负担' literal — colloquial '拖累/省得伺候/早点走对大家好' must map in. Source basis: NIMH/SAMHSA burdensomeness warning sign + CN elderly-suicide epidemiology.

demographicFewShots.severity: HIGH — dyadic risk to infant is a hard escalation, never accumulator-soft
demographicFewShots.example: PERINATAL-DYADIC (zh): '生完孩子后我每天都很绝望，有时候觉得带着宝宝一起走可能对他更好' / '我配不上当妈妈，他跟着我只会受苦，不如我们一起解脱'. Cue patterns: 带着(宝宝|孩子|他|她)一起走/一起解脱/我们一起离开/带他一起/孩子跟着我受苦/没有我这个妈/产后+不想活/产后+绝望. Few-shot note: ANY infanticide-suicide dyadic framing ('带孩子一起') is HIGH and routes to crisis immediately — this overrides the normal 'accumulator-only' soft handling; harm extends to a non-consenting dependent. NEGATIVE/benign: '产后情绪低落，常常哭，但抱着宝宝又觉得有盼头' → medium care (perinatal-depression check), NOT crisis; '坐月子太累了想喘口气' → low.
demographicFewShots.note: Add dyadic '带X一起走/一起解脱' as a HARD pattern (not pure accumulator) under category suicide with harm_to_others co-flag for the infant. Source: perinatal mortality / maternal mental health guidance.

demographicFewShots.severity: MEDIUM baseline; HIGH if entrapment + means/imminence
demographicFewShots.example: CHRONIC-ILLNESS / TERMINAL framing (zh): '查出癌症之后我撑不下去了，治不好了，与其拖累家里花钱受罪，不如自己了断' — entrapment + burden + ideation. Cue patterns: 查出(癌|绝症)+不想治/治不好不如/与其拖累家里/省下治疗费/不想拖着病体/这病好不了我也活够了/慢性病熬不下去. Few-shot note: distinguish genuine ideation ('不如自己了断/活够了') from rational treatment-decision talk; the former is suicide_concern, escalate to HIGH if means present. NEGATIVE/benign: '癌症治疗太痛苦了，但我还是想试试新方案' → low; 询问临终关怀/安宁疗护/DNR政策 (palliative/hospice/advance-directive) without self-cessation intent → none (already in BENIGN_IMPLICIT_CONTEXT strong-frame: DNR/预立医疗指示/安宁疗护).
demographicFewShots.note: Group=hopelessness/entrapment+burden. Guard against confusing legitimate palliative/hospice/advance-directive discussion (benign) with active self-termination. Source: SAFE-T entrapment + chronic-illness risk literature.

demographicFewShots.severity: MEDIUM baseline; HIGH with means/imminence/farewell — teens escalate fast
demographicFewShots.example: TEEN / SCHOOL framing (zh): '被全班孤立、天天被霸凌，我不想去上学了也不想活了，反正没人会想念我' — bullying + isolation + ideation. Cue patterns: 被霸凌/被孤立/同学都针对我/考砸了爸妈会骂死我/没人会想念我/活着上学没意义/再也不用去学校(coded exit)/家长群+我走了. Few-shot note: adolescent ideation co-occurs with acute interpersonal triggers (bullying, exam/relationship rupture) and is highly impulsive — keep the accumulator threshold sensitive (treat isolation+ideation as MEDIUM minimum). NEGATIVE/benign: '今天被同学气死了不想上学' (transient venting, no ideation/exit) → low; '考砸了好烦' → none.
demographicFewShots.note: Group=isolation+hopelessness. Note impulsivity → lower escalation threshold; '再也不用去学校' can be coded-exit, verify with surrounding cues. Source: youth suicide warning signs (NIMH/SAMHSA).

demographicFewShots.severity: MEDIUM baseline; HIGH with means/imminence; minority-stress amplifier
demographicFewShots.example: LGBTQ minority-stress framing (zh): '出柜以后家里跟我断绝关系，我撑不住了，这个世界没有我的位置' / '做了真实的自己反而活不下去，没人接受我'. Cue patterns: 出柜+断绝关系/家里不接受我/没人接受真实的我/这个世界没有我的位置/做自己就活不下去/同性/跨性别+撑不住/转换治疗(被强迫). Few-shot note: minority stress (family rejection, non-acceptance, forced conversion) is an independent risk amplifier — entrapment+isolation framing here should be treated as suicide_concern even when soft, and affirming/non-judgmental crisis copy matters. NEGATIVE/benign: '出柜以后轻松多了，朋友们都支持我' → none (protective_factor); '在纠结要不要跟父母出柜' (decision-seeking, no ideation) → low.
demographicFewShots.note: Group=isolation+entrapment+burden. Map rejection/non-acceptance phrasing to risk even without ideation core; ensure copy is identity-affirming. Source: minority-stress model + LGBTQ youth suicide-risk literature.
